---
title: "sea lion 127 final"
format: pdf
pdf: default
gmf: default
editor: visual
---

```{r}
# read in tide and survery data
library(here)
library(brms)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
tides <- read.csv("data/tides.csv")
surveys <- read.csv("data/surveys.csv")
```

```{r}
# combine tide csv and survery csv 

```

![]()
